content.scenarioHint: 朋友邀请你一起去短途旅行，但你最近经济紧张，想礼貌地婉拒。你需要用自然的英语表达你的感谢并说明无法参加的原因。
expectedAnswers: That sounds amazing, but I'm really on a tight budget right now—I'll have to pass this time.
I'd love to join you, but I'm trying to save up lately, so I can't afford to travel right now.
Thanks so much for inviting me! I really want to go, but my finances are stretched thin this month.
That's such a cool idea! I'm sorry, but I've got to keep my spending low for now—maybe next time?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了婉拒的意图并保持礼貌
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常对话习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'budget', 'tight', 'save', 'afford' 等相关关键词

content.scenarioHint: 朋友邀请你周末去山里自驾游，说费用很低，但你预算紧张想婉拒，你需要礼貌地表达感谢并说明自己暂时无法参加。
expectedAnswers: That sounds amazing, thanks for inviting me! I'd love to go, but I'm on a tight budget this month.
Wow, that’s such a fun idea! I really appreciate it, but I can’t afford to travel right now.
Thanks so much for thinking of me—I’ve been trying to save up lately, so I’ll have to skip this one, but let me know about future trips!
I’m really flattered you asked, but I’m keeping my spending low this month. Hope you have an awesome trip!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达了婉拒的意图，同时保持礼貌和感激
语言准确性：语法结构正确，用词恰当，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常对话习惯，语气真诚自然

content.speakerText: I heard you’re not going on the hiking trip again? Don’t you ever want to get out?
content.speakerTextCn: 我听说你又不去徒步旅行了？你难道从不想出去走走吗？
expectedAnswers: I totally want to! I just need to save up first—next time I’m bringing the best snacks and the most energy!
You’re right, I’ve been staying in too much. I’m working on a travel fund—next trip, I’m in for sure!
I miss adventures so much! Right now, I’m being smart with money, but I’m already planning the next hike with you.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：回应对方质疑，不防御，表达真实愿望
语言准确性：使用正确时态和口语化表达（saving up, I’m in for sure）
表达自然度：语气真诚、积极，避免消极或敷衍
关键词覆盖：使用了 save up / next trip / snacks / adventures 等场景关键词
